name: PAD / Terminal
description: Interactive terminal or PAD session over serial, console, hosted terminal, or terminal server

name: POTS / ShadyTel Modem
description: Dial-up access through Exchange 88, modem pool, or POTS line

name: Wi-Fi / TCP
description: Local web terminal, telnet-like endpoint, SSH-style shell, or campsite service bridge

name: MeshCore Radio PAD
description: Managed OMNIDAT loaner and fixed-node radio access using compact Radio PAD commands

name: Meshtastic Radio PAD
description: BYO guest radio ingress using compact Radio PAD commands with stricter size and rate limits

name: OMNIDAT Hosted Node
description: OMNIDAT-hosted campsite app template with assigned packet address and owner credentials

name: Remote Campsite Node
description: Campsite-hosted service routed through OMNIDAT by Wi-Fi/TCP, POTS, or future XOT/X.25 gateway
